transcript.text:
[Horror Gourmet]
[It came out in the city...]
[Walking...]
[Full of eerie energy...]
[Found its target]
[Werewolf Tzuayng]
[But the real horror starts now...]
[What even scared her?]
[The bill]
Hello everyone
I've been to one of New York's top 3 steakhouses before
called Wolfgang's Steakhouse
[Back in the year 2020]
[Global shock]
I even got to meet the CEO there
And I remember that I really enjoyed the food there

I found out there's 1 here too
[Let's go]
[Wolfgang's Steakhouse] [Seoul, Gangnam-gu]
It's very luxurious
It's red carpet here
I made a reservation...
-For Tzuyang? -Yes
Right this way Nice to meet you
Thank you
The tables were very close to each other at the NY location
They're pretty distanced here but feels similar
The wine list here,
And the drinks here
Oh, this is all wine?
I'm not used to this
[The real menu]

Feels very luxurious
Lobster bisque sounds good
Mushroom soup too
I didn't enjoy the soup in NY
We watched your New York mukbang
[Struggled because of the language barrier]
[And received a veggie soup]
[Thankfully she can use Korean this time]
I ordered all the steaks last time
Can I do it again?
Yeah let's go ahead and do that
Except for the vegetables
-All of the steaks are available? -Yes
Then can I get 1 of each?
From here to there?
How would you like them cooked?

Medium rare
And...
This, lobster bisque, please
We use a fresh lobster so it can be a little fishy Are you still okay with that?
[Hmm...]
How about the mushroom soup?
We only use mushrooms and no other dairy product
So it will taste very healthy
I don't like that
Is the lobster bisque popular?
Foreign customers enjoy it
But it can be a hit or a miss for Koreans
I'm curious
Would you like to order that?
Yes, thank you
We also have this that's only sold in Korea Wolfgang's

Cooked aged kimchi
[That's funny]
Yes, I'll take that as well
[Emergency!]
All of our workers can't finish this order
It'll take about 10 people
[Dry Aged Meat]
[After cutting out the outside part]
[Salt it a bit]
[Fire!]
-Hello! -Hello
Do you not remember me?
We met in New York
[No way]
-Nice to see you again -Why're you here?
Here before of covid

Really?
I knew he sounded familiar
I was struggling because of English
And he was there at the time to help me
[Met in New York]
Did you order everything?
I didn't know who you were back then
It was an honor
[Same here]
[It was very nice seeing you again]
[Every steak on the menu!]
This can't be for 1 person
She's very small too
There won't be too many people that can eat all of this
[Calm...]
This is great

So soft
[Lobster Bisque]
How do you like the soup?
I think it's okay
The smokey flavors are strong
It's gotta be the guts
Strong lobster flavors
A hit or a miss definitely
It's okay for me
Dipped with bread?
[3 servers for 1 customer]
This is on our hidden menu
I will make it in front of you
She's eating 730g more today than the mukbang back in NY
The porterhouse steak here has the tenderloin between the bones
Striploin and sirloin here

What's on the bottom is the clarified butter juice
Sirloin here too
Butter and meat juice on top too?
You can compare the taste with the tenderloin steak over there
Really good with it
This feels more tender here than the one in NY
Sirloin now
I'm loving the butter flavor
So juicy
The sirloin has more consistency
The tenderloin is soft and not greasy
Sauce!
I think I ate it with sauce last time too
Lots of sauce
He said it's good with the potatoes
It's like mashed potato fries

That's good
That's good
This is dry-aged
And this is wet-aged
Let's compare it
Same part but seems different
This definitely tastes more clean
I want to try this too
[Not everyone can do it...]
The striploin feels chewier
Personally, I think it tastes better today
I'm loving the butter juice
Put a little on
There's this tendon part here that's chewy
I like the texture
I haven't had the ribeye yet Let's try it

[Looks like a tomahawk]
The ribeye cap here
This part first then
Let's try the cooked aged kimchi
I'm curious
A great palate cleanser
High-quality kimchi
A little bit of sourness
Fancy taste
The ribeye cap is so good I want to save it
Let's leave this here
I'll just cut it in any way
Not against the grain
But everything cuts so easily
This is how I like my steak Medium rare
The ribeye is great

So good
[With butter]
It's cooked really well because it's cooked medium rare, but it's not dripping blood
[Lamb chop]
I haven't had this yet
Let's eat it as a whole
It's seasoned so well
I'm loving the distinct lamb taste
Regular tenderloin
[That thickness]
So thick
This is the tenderloin sauce
Dip a little bit
Unique
I like the steak sauce more
I thought it would be dry because it's not greasy

But it can get so tender if it's done right
How's your health?
My health? It's fine
That's good then I'm rooting for you
Thank you
Thank you
I remember they kept refilling my drink too
I still remember
I feel more comfortable here
I had a hard time because I didn't know English
Let's eat some ribs too
The lamb ribs taste the best
I feel like a barbarian
I shouldn't be eating like this here
[Can't resist good food]
Lamb here tastes amazing

Ribeye cap!
It's good even if it's cold
Chewy and tender at the same time
I'm curious
What is it?
-This is a special dish in our hidden menu that I make for a selected few -Thank you
[What can it be?]
This is actually on our menu
Beef Steak Tomato and Onion
Just 3 pieces of onions and 3 pieces of tomatoes for 14,000 Won
[Lol]
[Pour in the sauce]
[Add the clarified butter juice]
[Black pepper]
[And mix it well]
I will get some on your plate

Manhattan Kimchi
[Lol]
[Manhattan-style kimchi!]
Thank you
That's delicious
Nothing special, but really good
It gets all the greasiness
It really is a Manhattan kimchi
The onions are really sweet and not spicy
[Falling in love...]
Cuts like butter
Manhattan kimchi is so tasty
[Proud]
I saw the recipe
So I can make it too next time
Tenderloin finished

The cap is really good
-You're really eating it all -I'm not finished yet
How are you liking the food and the service?
Everything is great
Steak and potatoes go really well together too
How am I just finding out about this?
On top just like this
[Very satisfied]
The lamb chop tasted the best today
I really love the taste of lamb
It's very addicting
Looks so good
That's so soft
[I do what I do best]
Thank you
[Mint jelly]

Lamb goes well with this
It can be weird at first, but it's good
I'm still at the first stage though
I should be pairing this with wine
[Where did all the steaks go?]
That's so tender
Finished!
[Applaud]
Thank you
[The owner of the Korean location]
[Met the Wolfgang CEO in New York]
He called from Hawaii to thank you for visiting Wolfgang again
And he wants us to serve you some dessert on the house
Thank you
He called us when you visited the NY location too
And said he was shocked because a fairy-looking girl ate so much food

And asked me if you were a famous person
And I let him know you're at the top
I'll be back with the dessert
[Is it Tzuyang's birthday today?]
It says "World Class No.1"
[Made by the workers here]
Really pretty
[That's not a candle...]
Thank you for today
It's dinner time here soon, so I'll to-go these
Thanks everyone
This is all I have left to give you
